title: Heads Up
description: Proactive survival alerts — durability warnings, hunger, inventory full, low health, potion expiry & more. All-in-one notification mod.
body:
Proactive survival alerts that watch your back while you play.

Heads Up gives you smart toast notifications for the things you forget to check — tool durability, hunger, health, inventory space, armor condition, potion timers, respawn status, oxygen, light level, and dangerous weather. It only speaks up when something actually needs your attention — and disappears when it doesn't. Zero screen clutter. Zero distraction. Just clean, context-aware warnings exactly when they matter.

The mod knows what matters — Fire Resistance expiring in a flower forest? Low priority. Fire Resistance expiring over a lava lake in a basalt delta? Critical. Same effect, different urgency — because context matters more than thresholds.

One lightweight, fully-configurable, client-side mod — replaces Durability Alerts, InventoryFullAlert, Pot Alert, and more. Works on vanilla servers, Realms, and Hypixel — zero server setup, zero dependencies headaches. MIT licensed, modpack-friendly, and ships with battle-tested defaults right out of the box.

Never lose a Netherite pickaxe to a moment of distraction again — Heads Up has your back.
